title: Loyalty Challenge Task Completion
description: Details about task completion records within a loyalty challenge's task, including accumulated values and item-level tracking.

xdm:completionDate.title: Completion Date
xdm:completionDate.description: Date and time when the task was completed.

xdm:accumulators.title: Accumulators
xdm:accumulators.description: Accumulated quantity, spend on qualifying items only, days, and item-level entries for this task completion.

xdm:spend.title: Spend
xdm:spend.description: Spend from items that satisfied this task only, excluding other line items in the same transactions.

xdm:item_list.title: Item List
xdm:item_list.description: Item-level contributions that counted toward this task completion.

xdm:quantity.title: Quantity
xdm:quantity.description: Total quantity accumulated for this task completion.

xdm:spend.title: Spend
xdm:spend.description: Spend from items that satisfied this task only, excluding other line items in the same transactions.

xdm:days.title: days
xdm:days.description: Number of qualified days accumulated for this task completion.

xdm:qualifiedEvents.title: Qualified Events
xdm:qualifiedEvents.description: List of events that provided progress toward task completion.

xdm:transactionId.title: Transaction ID
xdm:transactionId.description: Transaction ID associated with this qualified event.
